mapper.select: SELECT pattern_id AS patternId, project_id AS projectId, pattern_type AS patternType, title, description, code_example AS codeExample, frequency, last_seen_at AS lastSeenAt FROM project_memory WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY pattern_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO project_memory ( pattern_id, project_id, pattern_type, title, description, code_example, frequency, last_seen_at ) VALUES
( #{row.patternId}, #{row.projectId}, #{row.patternType}, #{row.title}, #{row.description}, #{row.codeExample}, #{row.frequency}, #{row.lastSeenAt} )
